title: {YTP} ~ The Grunt Heat: Chapter 38
description:
CW: Drug reference

Don't think I've ever done an entirely audio-based YTP before. There's a first time for everything, I suppose.

The source is "The Great Hunt" by Robert Jordan (in audiobook format) from a series I have neither read nor desired to.
